data.name: Liushih

weaponImprint.name: Shadow Runner
weaponImprint.trait: At the end of the action, the user's [effect:d149d223-ac66-4556-ba25-5d4fef2504e9] gains 1 random buff, lasting for 2 turns.
weaponImprint.effect: Hydro damage dealt by the user and their [effect:d149d223-ac66-4556-ba25-5d4fef2504e9] is increased by 20%/24%/28%/32%/36%/40%, critical damage dealt by basic attacks is increased by 15%/18%/21%/24%/27%/30%.
weaponImprint.imprintDescription: Damage dealt to targets with Hydro debuffs is increased by 2.5%, and damage dealt to targets without faction is increased by 2.5%.

data.effects: A gentle, polite, kind, and resilient Doll who lacks any sense of prices and numbers. As a result, her personal belongings are extremely expensive, and she's widely known as a "rich lady." She's also very generous, because in her view, giving the best resources unreservedly to those she cherishes is simply her rightful responsibility. "Welcome back, Commander! Um... may I ask, do you need reimbursement?"

skills.name: Close-In Defense Autocannon
skills.description: Deals 110% of attack as Hydro damage. This attack is a [effect:730ec3f9-4919-4842-b728-bb5f56fc0c9a] and is considered a Basic Attack.

summon.name: Pegasus
summon.unitInfo: Summoned creature, inherits Liu Shi's initial attributes. Cannot move. Enters [effect:909a9280-6906-46f0-aae4-5b57ba14ef8d] state when receiving fatal damage; if in [effect:16ed69a1-b5aa-4af3-8079-3386d220d3fa] state, Pegasus exits that state.

skills.name: Line Breaker
skills.description: Select 1 enemy target within 9 tiles and deals Hydro damage equal to 90% of attack. This attack is considered a [effect:730ec3f9-4919-4842-b728-bb5f56fc0c9a].

skills.name: Pegasus
skills.description: Summoned creature, inherits Liu Shi's initial attributes. Cannot move. Enters [effect:909a9280-6906-46f0-aae4-5b57ba14ef8d] state when receiving fatal damage; if in [effect:16ed69a1-b5aa-4af3-8079-3386d220d3fa] state, Pegasus exits that state.

summon.name: Pegasus
summon.unitInfo: Summoned creature, inherits Liu Shi's initial attributes. Cannot move. Enters [effect:909a9280-6906-46f0-aae4-5b57ba14ef8d] state when receiving fatal damage; if in [effect:16ed69a1-b5aa-4af3-8079-3386d220d3fa] state, Pegasus exits that state.

skills.name: We Fight as One
skills.description:
At the start of battle, summons [summon:0b41f7fe-d147-4f25-ab7e-c3bce2882959] close to Liushih.

For every 60 points of Liushih's initial attack, increase the basic attack damage multiplier of both herself and [summon:0b41f7fe-d147-4f25-ab7e-c3bce2882959] is increased by 5%, up to a maximum of 50%.

Before using the active attack [dollSkill:99c9578f-644f-4a9c-9ec3-a44bc7088690] or the Ultimate [dollSkill:e2e3431f-a126-479f-aa1b-f733d5d0c07f], inflicts [effect:fee43244-a3d3-4888-bcbe-8a858ebb037c] to the target lasting for 2 rounds.

After [summon:0b41f7fe-d147-4f25-ab7e-c3bce2882959] uses [skillsummon:76cc19ff-faff-48db-9086-345969c15b3a], Liushih gains 1 point of Confectance Index.
skills.descriptionLevel2:
At the start of battle, summons [summon:0b41f7fe-d147-4f25-ab7e-c3bce2882959] close to Liushih.

For every 60 points of Liushih's initial attack, increase the basic attack damage multiplier of both herself and [summon:0b41f7fe-d147-4f25-ab7e-c3bce2882959] is increased by 5%, up to a maximum of 50%.

After the end of the turn, [summon:0b41f7fe-d147-4f25-ab7e-c3bce2882959] will use [skillsummon:76cc19ff-faff-48db-9086-345969c15b3a] once at the nearest enemy target within range.

After [summon:0b41f7fe-d147-4f25-ab7e-c3bce2882959] uses [skillsummon:76cc19ff-faff-48db-9086-345969c15b3a], Liushih gains 1 point of Confectance Index.

For each point of Confectance Index expended, Liushih and [summon:0b41f7fe-d147-4f25-ab7e-c3bce2882959] gain 1 stack of [effect:4041e0a2-5804-4e3f-aa8a-a62a57ef5621] lasting 1 round. skills.name: Strategic Masterstroke
skills.description: Selects 1 tile within a cross-shaped area of 4 to 8 tiles, landing on the selected tile, and moves [summon:0b41f7fe-d147-4f25-ab7e-c3bce2882959] to a position near her. If [summon:0b41f7fe-d147-4f25-ab7e-c3bce2882959] is in [effect:16ed69a1-b5aa-4af3-8079-3386d220d3fa] or [effect:909a9280-6906-46f0-aae4-5b57ba14ef8d] state, remove that state. After skill usage, Liushih gains [effect:c1feeb2a-d9a9-4a73-9703-8806ee8cb9eb].

skills.description: Selects 1 enemy target within 9 tiles, [summon:0b41f7fe-d147-4f25-ab7e-c3bce2882959] gains the [effect:16ed69a1-b5aa-4af3-8079-3386d220d3fa] state, and deals Hydro damage equal to 90% of attack. This attack is considered a [effect:730ec3f9-4919-4842-b728-bb5f56fc0c9a].

Damage multiplier is increased to 120%.

keys.effect: Damage dealt by the user's [effect:d149d223-ac66-4556-ba25-5d4fef2504e9] is increased by 10%.

When [summon:0b41f7fe-d147-4f25-ab7e-c3bce2882959] is in [effect:16ed69a1-b5aa-4af3-8079-3386d220d3fa] state, increase the damage dealt of both Liushih and [summon:0b41f7fe-d147-4f25-ab7e-c3bce2882959] by 20%.
Each stack of [effect:4041e0a2-5804-4e3f-aa8a-a62a57ef5621] increases critical rate by 5%.

After using the active skill [dollSkill:083f7db6-7161-446f-bae4-ab871dc9c23b], Liushih gains 4 tiles of [effect:1b83587d-eddc-4abd-b90c-cb0aa4b2cfef].

After an ally [effect:d149d223-ac66-4556-ba25-5d4fef2504e9] (excluding [summon:0b41f7fe-d147-4f25-ab7e-c3bce2882959]) attacks, Liushih gains 1 point of Confectance Index. This effect can trigger once per unit per round.

doll.name: Liushih
doll.effects: A gentle, polite, kind, and resilient Doll who lacks any sense of prices and numbers. As a result, her personal belongings are extremely expensive, and she's widely known as a "rich lady." She's also very generous, because in her view, giving the best resources unreservedly to those she cherishes is simply her rightful responsibility. "Welcome back, Commander! Um... may I ask, do you need reimbursement?"

Um... may I ask, do you need reimbursement?"

skillsLevel3.name: We Fight as One
skillsLevel3.description:
At the start of battle, summons [summon:0b41f7fe-d147-4f25-ab7e-c3bce2882959] close to Liushih.

For every 60 points of Liushih's initial attack, increase the basic attack damage multiplier of both herself and [summon:0b41f7fe-d147-4f25-ab7e-c3bce2882959] is increased by 5%, up to a maximum of 50%.

Before using the active attack [dollSkill:99c9578f-644f-4a9c-9ec3-a44bc7088690] or the Ultimate [dollSkill:e2e3431f-a126-479f-aa1b-f733d5d0c07f], inflicts [effect:fee43244-a3d3-4888-bcbe-8a858ebb037c] to the target lasting for 2 rounds.

After [summon:0b41f7fe-d147-4f25-ab7e-c3bce2882959] uses [skillsummon:76cc19ff-faff-48db-9086-345969c15b3a], Liushih gains 1 point of Confectance Index.

For every 60 points of Liushih's initial attack, increase the basic attack damage multiplier of both herself and [summon:0b41f7fe-d147-4f25-ab7e-c3bce2882959] is increased by 5%, up to a maximum of 50%.

Before using the active attack [dollSkill:99c9578f-644f-4a9c-9ec3-a44bc7088690] or the Ultimate [dollSkill:e2e3431f-a126-479f-aa1b-f733d5d0c07f], inflicts [effect:fee43244-a3d3-4888-bcbe-8a858ebb037c] to the target lasting for 2 rounds.

For each point of Confectance Index gained this turn, the user and all friendly [effect:d149d223-ac66-4556-ba25-5d4fef2504e9] gain 1 stack of [effect:8356c5aa-327e-4d84-8d55-fd91783b5833] before using the active skill [dollSkill:99c9578f-644f-4a9c-9ec3-a44bc7088690], lasting for 1 round.

vertebrae.effect: The number of [effect:4041e0a2-5804-4e3f-aa8a-a62a57ef5621] stack gained is doubled.

doll.name: Liushih
doll.effects: A gentle, polite, kind, and resilient Doll who lacks any sense of prices and numbers. As a result, her personal belongings are extremely expensive, and she's widely known as a "rich lady." She's also very generous, because in her view, giving the best resources unreservedly to those she cherishes is simply her rightful responsibility. "Welcome back, Commander! Um... may I ask, do you need reimbursement?"

skillsLevel3.name: All or Nothing
skillsLevel3.description: Selects 1 enemy target within 9 tiles, deals Hydro damage equal to 90% of attack. Expends all points of Confectance Index. For each point of Confectance Index expended, Liushih and [summon:0b41f7fe-d147-4f25-ab7e-c3bce2882959] gain 1 stack of [effect:4041e0a2-5804-4e3f-aa8a-a62a57ef5621] lasting 1 round. After skill usage, Liushih gains [effect:3fbcb8ae-7ffa-4e2e-9dce-1269da8ff4d2]. This attack is considered a [effect:730ec3f9-4919-4842-b728-bb5f56fc0c9a]. This skill can be used while [summon:0b41f7fe-d147-4f25-ab7e-c3bce2882959] is in the [effect:16ed69a1-b5aa-4af3-8079-3386d220d3fa] state.

summons.name: Pegasus
summons.unitInfo: Summoned creature, inherits Liu Shi's initial attributes. Cannot move. Enters [effect:909a9280-6906-46f0-aae4-5b57ba14ef8d] state when receiving fatal damage; if in [effect:16ed69a1-b5aa-4af3-8079-3386d220d3fa] state, Pegasus exits that state.

imagoforms.effect: Damage dealt by this unit's Physical Summons is increased by 8%.
